name: Snickers Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle the chopped Snickers candy evenly over the pie shell.
2. In a medium bowl, combine sugar, softened cream cheese, beaten eggs, creamy peanut butter, and sour cream. Mix well until smooth.
3. Spread the mixture evenly over the Snickers pieces.
4. Sprinkle roasted peanuts around the outer edge of the pie.
5. Drizzle melted chocolate chips over the peanuts.
6. Chill the pie for 1 hour before serving to allow the filling to set.
